_comment: Short on-screen reveal lines per photo id. Keep under ~95 chars so they fit two lines in the reel. If an id is missing, make-reel.mjs falls back to the photo title only and prints a warning.
ph_001: Potsdamer Platz as Berlin's electric crossroads — traffic tower and all.
ph_002: Constitution Day crowds at the Gate, long before the Cold War postcard.
ph_003: Tempelhof already drawing crowds — years before the Airlift made it famous.
ph_004: The whole city grinds to a halt — one year before everything changes.
ph_008: August 1961 — the Wall goes up, and the Gate closes for 28 years.
ph_010: 9 November — hours after the announcement, the city simply walks through.
